name: Neural Nomad #28: Emerald — Surveyor
description: Standing at the edge of what was possible, measuring distances between who she was and who she's becoming. Each boundary walked becomes real only when named. The surveyor's work is lonely — marking territories that didn't exist yesterday.
threshold_note: This is the moment when expansion requires a map, when becoming needs edges to know itself against.
collector_meaning: You hold the exact second when growth demands form. When the infinite must choose its shape.
